title: N9 0BA, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/FP3535LD/V009
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Deephams Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/FP3535LD/V009   "
